demo.title: lonestaroracle-robinhood-x402.sh
demo.code:
# LoneStarOracle on Robinhood Chain: pay-per-call data over x402 (USDG on chain 4663). No signup, no API key.
# 1) Call any endpoint - you get HTTP 402 with payment terms
curl -s "https://equity.lonestaroracle.xyz/equity?symbol=NVDA"

# 2) Pay the advertised USDG amount on Robinhood Chain (4663) with your x402-capable agent/wallet,
#    then retry the same URL with the payment proof header to receive JSON.

# More examples:
curl -s "https://ta.lonestaroracle.xyz/scan?symbol=AAPL"       # technical-analysis scan
curl -s "https://macro.lonestaroracle.xyz/macro"             # macro regime signal
curl -s "https://rwa.lonestaroracle.xyz/rwa-risk?vault=ousg" # tokenized-RWA vault risk

# 16 Robinhood-Chain services: https://lonestaroracle.xyz  |  Base (USDC) catalog: lonestaroracle-data skill

setup: No signup or API key. You need an x402-capable agent or wallet that can pay USDG on Robinhood Chain (chain 4663).
On HTTP 402, pay the advertised USDG amount on Robinhood Chain and retry to receive structured JSON.
Payee is 0xeF2a4B6756895aAf1374640dcFCD4947959442ab; token is USDG (0x5fc5360D0400a0Fd4f2af552ADD042D716F1d168). Verify both before signing.
Browse all services at https://lonestaroracle.xyz. The full 49-service Base (USDC) catalog is the lonestaroracle-data skill.
